what_was_done: Fixed 3 critical toolshed proxy issues causing intermittent search failures: added 30s timeout (was infinite), replaced Lock with Semaphore(10) for concurrency, added auto-reconnect with cooldown. Restarted via systemd. 4 backends/22 tools confirmed.
known_issues: Memory server cold-start takes 80-160s (model load) — mitigated by toolshed timeout+reconnect but not eliminated
nomic-embed-text-v2-moe without megablocks is CPU-intensive (install megablocks for 3-5x speedup)
Gate 17: injection_attempts type mismatch can crash gate (HIGH)
Gate 1: path traversal ../../../../etc/passwd bypasses extension guard (HIGH)
Gate 2: Unicode non-breaking space bypasses rm -rf regex (MEDIUM)
Gate 17: plaintext injection phrases not scanned on PreToolUse (MEDIUM)
next_steps: Fix memory server cold-start: install megablocks or add safe warmup without torch thread leak
Fix 3 HIGH security issues (gate_02 rm -r, gate_17 type mismatch, gate_01 path traversal)
Fix MEDIUM security issues (unicode bypass, injection scan gap, LIVE_STATE guard)
Add per-server timeout overrides in toolshed.json (e.g. memory: 60s for heavy queries)
last_response_preview: Toolshed restarted via systemd: 4 backends, 22 tools. MCP reconnected.
